questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
Does the patient have a history of CIN 2/3 before hysterectomy? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have HNPCC associated genetic mutation carrier status? (Yes/No)
Is the patient in a country with limited resources? (Yes/No)
Has the patient recently douched (within 48 hours)? (Yes/No)
Has the patient recently used vaginal cream (within 1 week)? (Yes/No)
Has the patient had recent coitus (within 24 hours)? (Yes/No)
